name: South of the Border Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt butter.
2. Brown meat, a few pieces at a time.
3. Remove the meat from the skillet.
4. Saute zucchini in the skillet for 7-10 minutes.
5. Return the meat to the skillet and add corn, chopped green chilies, minced garlic, salt, oregano, and cumin.
6. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for about 12-15 minutes or until the meat is tender.
7. Stir in cheese until melted.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve.
